title: c8x
description: c8x is a vanilla style 8x resource pack
body:
c8x is a vanilla style 8x resource pack

c8x will soon retexture the entire game, however currently it only retextures certain areas of the game:
- the end
- the nether
- caves         (partial)
- plains biomes (partial)
- 26.2          (missing sulfur cube texture)

c8x has ETF support!
